rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into the implementation scope when binding to implementation-specific outputs or subcomponent connections.
Preserve AADL component type scope boundaries: do not reference subcomponents or implementation-only ports in component type annexes.
generic_rules: Bind output derivations to implementation annexes when they depend on internal structure not visible at the type level.
Only use features explicitly declared in the AADL model as variables in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to wrap all AGREE content.
Use `eq` for intermediate computations and `assign` for direct output bindings in implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or internal ports in component type annexes.
